_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 11:25 UTC tick (8 M15 bar_close all SKIP). Iran MFA not sending negotiators to Islamabad Round 2 citing Hormuz blockade + container ship capture as truce breaches. Trump extension 'highly unlikely', threatens 'lots of bombs start going off'. WTI May $88.60, Brent June $94.89. 3 MODIFY, 8 queries KEEP, 0 positions $1000 matches broker.

level_alerts.note: AUDUSD 0.71631 (bounce +2.7p vs 11:25). Still ~93p above 0.707 breakdown. Armed for risk-off dump on Iran deal failure / Hormuz escalation.
USDJPY 159.137 drifted 6p lower, now 0.31 below 159.45 fade. Armed if bounce back into zone. Ceasefire expiry today PM UTC.

Oil 87.113 (pulled back from 87.47 M15 hi). 2.9 below 90 escalation trigger. Ceasefire expires Tue eve ~22 UTC per WaPo/CNBC; Trump per CNN says 'Wed eve Washington' = Thu ~02 UTC. Mixed signals on Iran Islamabad attendance. Armed for gap-up on collapse.
